sourcePreview.missing: Source PNG is missing from the input folder.

friendly.noPngFiles: The selected folder has no PNG files.
friendly.maxSizeExceeded: An image is larger than the max size.
friendly.cropInvalid: The crop area is outside the image.
friendly.sampleMissing: The sample project is not included in this build.

inputRequired.selectFolder: Select a folder that contains PNG images in the Project panel.

outputRequired.selectFolder: Select an output folder before exporting.

noPngFiles.addPng: Add .png files to the input folder or choose another folder.

duplicateSpriteName.rename: Rename the files or set sprite name overrides.

maxSizeExceeded.resize: Increase Max Size or reduce the image size.

cropInvalid.adjust: Move the crop rectangle inside the source image.

outputFolderMissing.checkFolder: The folder may have been deleted or moved.
outputFolderMissing.permission: Check that you have permission to open the folder.

sampleMissing.openCheckout: Open the repository checkout to use the sample project.

fallback.details: Open Details and review the technical message.
